summary: POTUS retweet of the same 8-second vertical clip of President Trump boarding Air Force One, pausing to wave, and entering the plane, with a plain 'President Trump Departs For China' text card. No dialogue and likely a background music bed, but it is a single continuous shot of a real departure with no cinematic styling, fast-cutting or genre treatment, so it is a lightly-edited event clip rather than a produced spectacle.
notable_text: On-screen title card: 'President Trump Departs For China'
